name: Aroma Blend
desc: Discard 1 card; place 1 "Humid Winds", "Dried Winds", or "Blessed Winds" from your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Plant Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing its materials from your hand or field. If your LP are higher than your opponent's, you can also banish Plant monsters from your GY as material. You can only use each effect of "Aroma Blend" once per turn.
eff: Discard 1 card; place 1 "Humid Winds", "Dried Winds", or "Blessed Winds" from your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Plant Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing its materials from your hand or field. If your LP are higher than your opponent's, you can also banish Plant monsters from your GY as material. You can only use each effect of "Aroma Blend" once per turn.

action: Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
